chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. C.P D-316 of 2024: Amir Ali Abro vs. S.H.O. P.S. Rehmatpur Larkana and others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Ahmed Bux Abro, Advocate Date of hearing: 15.05.2024 Date of Order: 15.05.2024 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. This petition agitates the issue of harassment and the pleadings and prayer are prima facie dissonant with the binding ratio of a Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as PLD 2019 Sindh 168. Upon being so confronted, learned counsel remained unable to satisfy as to the maintainability hereof. As a corollary, transfer of investigation in some FIRs is also sought; directly and in the first instance by direct recourse to writ jurisdiction. No case is made out for entertaining the relief sought; moreover without exhausting recourse available under the law. The petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed along with listed applications in limine. Judge Judge
